assertionResults.fullName: CRAN-30: Account settings GET /api/account returns 401 without auth
assertionResults.title: returns 401 without auth

assertionResults.fullName: CRAN-30: Account settings GET /api/account returns the authenticated user profile
assertionResults.title: returns the authenticated user profile

assertionResults.fullName: CRAN-30: Account settings PUT /api/account/profile updates display_name and preferred_language
assertionResults.title: updates display_name and preferred_language

assertionResults.fullName: CRAN-30: Account settings PUT /api/account/profile rejects an unsupported language code
assertionResults.title: rejects an unsupported language code

assertionResults.fullName: CRAN-30: Account settings PUT /api/account/profile rejects an oversized display name
assertionResults.title: rejects an oversized display name

assertionResults.fullName: CRAN-30: Account settings PUT /api/account/profile rejects empty payload
assertionResults.title: rejects empty payload

assertionResults.fullName: CRAN-30: Account settings PUT /api/account/password changes the password when the current password is correct
assertionResults.title: changes the password when the current password is correct

assertionResults.fullName: CRAN-30: Account settings PUT /api/account/password rejects with wrong currentPassword
assertionResults.title: rejects with wrong currentPassword

assertionResults.fullName: CRAN-30: Account settings PUT /api/account/password rejects when newPassword and confirmPassword differ
assertionResults.title: rejects when newPassword and confirmPassword differ

assertionResults.fullName: CRAN-30: Account settings PUT /api/account/password rejects a weak new password
assertionResults.title: rejects a weak new password

assertionResults.fullName: CRAN-30: Account settings PUT /api/account/password invalidates the old session and writes an audit-log entry
assertionResults.title: invalidates the old session and writes an audit-log entry

assertionResults.fullName: CRAN-30: Account settings PUT /api/account/email initiates a verification flow without changing the live email
assertionResults.title: initiates a verification flow without changing the live email

assertionResults.fullName: CRAN-30: Account settings PUT /api/account/email rejects an email already in use by another account
assertionResults.title: rejects an email already in use by another account

assertionResults.fullName: CRAN-30: Account settings PUT /api/account/email rejects when newEmail equals current email
assertionResults.title: rejects when newEmail equals current email

assertionResults.fullName: CRAN-30: Account settings PUT /api/account/email finalises the change when /email/confirm is called with the right token
assertionResults.title: finalises the change when /email/confirm is called with the right token

assertionResults.fullName: CRAN-30: Account settings PUT /api/account/email rejects /email/confirm with the wrong token
assertionResults.title: rejects /email/confirm with the wrong token
